positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, rendered as a minimalist linocut woodblock print illustration. The composition features symmetrical, interlocking shapes of cosmic trees and glowing planetary flora set against a deep indigo and turquoise gradient background. Focus on clean, solid black silhouettes for the foreground elements against the vibrant background. Strong use of negative space and high contrast. Art Deco influence with an ethereal, bioluminescent quality. Perfect for a central apparel print, vectors, graphic design quality, ultra-detailed, high contrast, symmetry.
